title: Fail to execute SELECT in TiDB but succeed in MySQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c2 INT DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t3(c3 FLOAT, c4 NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t3(c3, c4) VALUES (1.5, NULL);
SELECT t2.c1, t3.c3 FROM t2 JOIN t3 ON t2.c2 = CAST(t3.c4 AS INTEGER) WHERE t3.c3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT fails due to expected integer error in TiDB
